meaning: n.减食疗法adj.减轻体重的,使苗条的
examples: Personally, I do not believe in any of these slimming gadgets.
I'm overwhelmed with the wide range of different slimming products each year.
Apart from what people eat, I've also seen many interesting slimming products.
In addition to slimming down the design, the company opted for more premium materials.
The lingering downturn is slimming the ranks of smaller and less sound regional and independent broker-dealers.
